notes: Reviewed host-tool results are now normalized into live ChatBridge app parts instead of stopping at tool-call output.
The reviewed launch surface starts the bridge host controller, persists ready/state/recovery into host-owned session records, and emits traceable reviewed-app launch proof.
Artifact preview remains isolated on the explicit render-html-preview path with dedicated regression coverage.
focusedGreenCommand: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 20 >/dev/null && pnpm exec vitest run src/renderer/packages/chatbridge/reviewed-app-launch.test.ts src/renderer/packages/chatbridge/bridge/reviewed-app-runtime.test.ts src/renderer/components/chatbridge/apps/ReviewedAppLaunchSurface.test.tsx src/renderer/components/Artifact.test.tsx test/integration/chatbridge/scenarios/reviewed-app-bridge-launch.test.ts
